title: BuildsModpacks
description: Performance, QOL and visual quality focused modpacks, which keep it vanilla.
body:
BuildsModpacks are modpacks made for Kermitcraft (private server), focused on optimization and QoL with high customizability. It also adds some server-specific things, such as the F1 boat models and Simple Voice Chat. Finally, some visual and audio mods are also included, such as HUD QoL additions, sound physics and particle weather.

Version first includes the Minecraft version, then the modpack version.

If you run into any issues, please get in touch with buildandplay on Discord (or @BuildandPlay) in [the Kermitcraft Discord](https://discord.gg/Sdfghsghh) and I'll try to help out.

None of the mods nor any of the shaders are made or owned by me. I have no affiliation with them.
